== Notes for [[Item:Q115322|Q115322]] ==

See http://trees.ancestry.com/tree/25067072/person/12805791306

Gayo, NFP, 1941, Peminteis $ 9 N2:

D. MARTIM VASQUES PEMINTEL f.o de D. Vasco Martins N 1 do $ 1. Foi Sr. de Rezende. Cazou com D. Constança Martins f.a de Martim Aff.o Rezende e D. Constança Rodriguez de Meira no Conde D. P.o fls. 223 N 18.

[...]
--------------------
V. Gaio, t. 22, "Peminteis", [§1, n°1, p. 137]. '''Sua geraçaõ: t. 22, "Peminteis", §9.'''

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
